Two rejection branches lack direct negative tests; one is likely redundant
S08 is a near-clone of S07; production_ready here means closed contract slice, not runtime capability
Disposition owner for S08 differs from adjacent S07 entry
findings.evidence: Claude observed the new S08 weighted_title_disposition owner used control-plane-contract while adjacent S07 used Codex.
findings.recommended_action: Align S08 owner metadata with S07.
findings.resolution: contracts/control-plane-contract.json now records the S08 weighted_title_disposition owner as Codex.

findings.title: Two rejection branches lack direct negative tests; one is likely redundant
findings.evidence: Claude observed no direct negative test for secondary_workflow_path_applied false and noted the S07 decision re-check is likely redundant after assertControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffPrimaryHappyPathResult.
findings.recommended_action: Add a negative test for secondary_workflow_path_applied false and either test or keep the decision guard as defense-in-depth.
findings.resolution: packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js now rejects secondary_workflow_path_applied false. The primary_happy_path_decision re-check is retained as intentional defense-in-depth because the upstream S07 result validator already rejects tampered decisions before S08 emits a receipt.

findings.title: S08 is a near-clone of S07; production_ready here means closed contract slice, not runtime capability
findings.evidence: Claude observed S08 mirrors S07 structure and remains metadata-only, with no service logic, runtime route, permission engine, AuthZ, or audit write behavior.
findings.recommended_action: No code change required; document that production_ready denotes a validated closed contract slice.
findings.resolution: This subphase intentionally closes a metadata-only control-plane contract slice. construction-inspection.json and packet.json record that no runtime capability is claimed and handoff continues to RP00.P02.M02.S09.

review_summary: S08 correctly consumes the S07 primary happy path result, emits a frozen synthetic metadata-only secondary workflow receipt, carries S02-S07 and M00 refs plus handoff_context_ids and acceptance_gate_ids, supports firm-level null Matter context, fails closed on missing/wrong/tampered S07 input and forbidden or unknown secondary workflow claims, and preserves no-real-data/no-write/no-runtime/no-audit-write/no-handoff-draft boundaries. No P0/P1/P2 and no production_ready blocker.
